androidx.preference.SwitchPreferenceComp.android:summary: Record all incoming and outgoing voice calls
androidx.preference.SwitchPreferenceComp.android:title: Enable Call Recording

androidx.preference.Preference.android:summary: Browse and play your recorded conversations
androidx.preference.Preference.android:title: Manage Recordings

androidx.preference.SwitchPreferenceComp.android:summary: Block specific contacts from calling you
androidx.preference.SwitchPreferenceComp.android:title: Call Blocker

androidx.preference.SwitchPreferenceComp.android:summary: Show caller location and technical details
androidx.preference.SwitchPreferenceComp.android:title: Caller Insights
